recentFeedback.summary: Ability to save or export timelines as Premiere Pro projects to continue more in-depth editing after using Quick Cut. Many AI video editing apps do not offer this feature and it would be a great pain point to address all within the Adobe Suite.
recentFeedback.text: Ability to save or export timelines as Premiere Pro projects to continue more in-depth editing after using Quick Cut. Many AI video editing apps do not offer this feature and it would be a great pain point to address all within the Adobe Suite.
recentFeedback.parent_text:
*NEW FIREFLY VIDEO FEATURE REQUEST*
2026-02-27 09:41:48
--------------------------------------------------

*1. In as much detail as possible, please describe your feature request:*
Ability to save or export timelines as Premiere Pro projects to continue more in-depth editing after using Quick Cut. Many AI video editing apps do not offer this feature and it would be a great pain point to address all within the Adobe Suite.
--------------------------------------------------

*2. How would this feature request benefit you?*
This would make the Quick Cut tool more appealing to existing, traditional video editors by allowing them to make an initial draft in Firefly and then continue editing in the platform they're more familiar and comfortable with (and has more capabilities), Premiere Pro. 
--------------------------------------------------

*3. How would you categorize this feature request?*
New capability — this feature is not found in other video editing apps
--------------------------------------------------

*4. Which of the following best describe you?*
Video Professional
--------------------------------------------------

*Response ID:*
R_7xPoZ8emKPqer4c
